name: zc-ctx
description: Persistent memory, token optimization, and secure A2A multi-agent coordination for Claude Code. 19 MCP tools: RBAC session tokens (Ch.14), SHA256 broadcast hash chain (Ch.13 Biba), L0/L1/L2 tiered retrieval, credential-isolated sandbox, hybrid BM25+vector KB, MemGPT working memory, SSRF-protected fetch, and append-only broadcast channel with scrypt-hardened key. MIT license.
